## LibraryRuntime.Indexers.FillingRecipesByIngredientIndexer class

Indexer that finds recipes using a specific ingredient.

Supports filtering by: - Primary usage only - Alternate usage only - Any usage

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class FillingRecipesByIngredientIndexer extends BaseIndexer<IRuntimeFillingRecipe, FillingId, IFillingRecipesByIngredientConfig> 
```
